bird.name: Moustached turca
bird.summary: The moustached turca (Pteroptochos megapodius) is a passerine bird which is endemic to Chile and belongs to the tapaculo family Rhinocrypti…

locations.name: 阿塔卡马大区
locations.summary: 阿塔卡马大区（西班牙語：III Región de Atacama）是智利从北至南的第4个行政大区，有三个省组成：查尼亚拉尔省、科皮亚波省和瓦斯科省。首府科皮亚波（Copiapó），位于首都圣地亚哥以北806公里。 参考资料

locations.name: 安地斯山脈
locations.summary: 安地斯山脈（西班牙語：Cordillera de los Andes；奇楚亞語：Walla Antikuna）是地球陸地上最長的山脈，位於南美洲的西岸，約7,000公里長 (或8,900公里长)，200至700公里寬（最寬的部份在南緯18…

relations.subject: Moustached turca
relations.evidence: The isolated form, atacamae, occurs in the Atacama Region. All observations regarding reproductive individuals were found between the sea level and in the foothills of the Andes

relations.subject: Moustached turca
relations.evidence: Although not in at risk, the main threat to this species is habitat destruction and fragmentation
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
